import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    def find_obj(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # Find objects in both states
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, sq_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, sq_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)

    agent_y_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_y_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)
    holding_s_f = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n_f = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    pyr_on_grid_s = pyr_cnt_s > 0.5

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # === SUCCESS ===
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5)
    success_f = success.astype(jnp.float32)

    # === POTENTIAL FUNCTION ===
    # Define potential for each state based on phase
    # Phase 1 (not holding): potential = -dist(agent, pyramid)
    # Phase 2 (holding): potential = -dist(agent, square)  [want to be near square to place]
    # Phase 3 (placed adjacent): potential = large value

    dist_agent_pyr_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_agent_pyr_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - pyr_x_n)
    dist_agent_sq_s = jnp.abs(agent_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(agent_x_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_agent_sq_n = jnp.abs(agent_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(agent_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)

    # Potential: higher is better
    # Not holding: want to be close to pyramid
    pot_phase1_s = (max_dist - dist_agent_pyr_s) / max_dist
    pot_phase1_n = (max_dist - dist_agent_pyr_n) / max_dist

    # Holding: want to be close to square
    pot_phase2_s = (max_dist - dist_agent_sq_s) / max_dist
    pot_phase2_n = (max_dist - dist_agent_sq_n) / max_dist

    # When pyramid is placed (not held), want it close to square
    pot_phase3_s = (max_dist - dist_pyr_sq_s) / max_dist
    pot_phase3_n = (max_dist - dist_pyr_sq_n) / max_dist

    # Select potential based on phase
    # State s potential
    pot_s = jax.lax.select(
        holding_s,
        pot_phase2_s,
        jax.lax.select(pyr_on_grid_s, pot_phase1_s, pot_phase3_s)
    )
    # State n potential
    pot_n = jax.lax.select(
        holding_n,
        pot_phase2_n,
        jax.lax.select(pyr_on_grid_n, pot_phase1_n, pot_phase3_n)
    )

    # Potential-based shaping: F(s,a,s') = gamma * Phi(s') - Phi(s), gamma=1
    shaping = pot_n - pot_s

    # === MILESTONE BONUSES ===
    just_picked_up = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    pickup_bonus = just_picked_up.astype(jnp.float32) * 0.5

    just_put_down = holding_s & (~holding_n)
    # Reward proportional to how close pyramid landed to square
    putdown_proximity = just_put_down.astype(jnp.float32) * jax.lax.select(
        pyr_on_grid_n,
        (max_dist - dist_pyr_sq_n) / max_dist,
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # === TOTAL REWARD ===
    total_reward = (
        shaping * 1.0
        + pickup_bonus
        + putdown_proximity * 1.0
        + success_f * 5.0
    )

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
